short_text: Nortje to Nasum Ahmed, Hit-wicket!! Two-in-two and Bangladesh have been bundled out for a mere 84. Very full, very fast
full_text: Nortje to Nasum Ahmed, Hit-wicket!! Two-in-two and Bangladesh have been bundled out for a mere 84. Very full, very fast and it's just too good for Nasum - backed away on the drive and is beaten for pure pace. The base of middle takes a beating and that's that for Bangladesh, at least with the bat. Actually, he's out hit-wicket - was deep inside the crease and smashed his own stumps as he shaped for the drive.

short_text: Nortje to Mahedi Hasan, Caught&Bowled!! This has gone nowhere and Bangladesh's last hope of getting to 100 is over. Was
full_text: Nortje to Mahedi Hasan, Caught&Bowled!! This has gone nowhere and Bangladesh's last hope of getting to 100 is over. Was rushed for pace as he went for the slog, gets a thick top-edge and Nortje does the rest, running across towards cover. Proper fast-bowling conditions and South Africa are making merry at the moment.

short_text: Shamsi to Mahedi Hasan, 1 run, Shamsi goes wide of off as Mahedi came down the track, driven past cover and Mahedi will
full_text: Shamsi to Mahedi Hasan, 1 run, Shamsi goes wide of off as Mahedi came down the track, driven past cover and Mahedi will keep strike for the next over

short_text: Shamsi to Mahedi Hasan, no run, Mahedi attempts the reverse sweep now, but is through with the shot early and is hit on
full_text: Shamsi to Mahedi Hasan, no run, Mahedi attempts the reverse sweep now, but is through with the shot early and is hit on the body

short_text: Shamsi to Mahedi Hasan, no run, loopy delivery outside off - Mahedi shuffles across on the swipe, gets an inside edge th
full_text: Shamsi to Mahedi Hasan, no run, loopy delivery outside off - Mahedi shuffles across on the swipe, gets an inside edge that went dangerously close to his leg-stump

short_text: Shamsi to Mahedi Hasan, , , Mahedi is showing some fight for his team here - runs down the pitch, doesn't get too close
full_text: Shamsi to Mahedi Hasan, , , Mahedi is showing some fight for his team here - runs down the pitch, doesn't get too close to the ball and that allows him to free his arms, a lofted drive over cover and it went sailing over the ropes

short_text: Shamsi to Taskin Ahmed, Taskin Ahmed Run Out!! Suicidal running from Taskin and Bavuma sends him on his way with a  dire
full_text: Shamsi to Taskin Ahmed, Taskin Ahmed Run Out!! Suicidal running from Taskin and Bavuma sends him on his way with a  direct hit at the bowler's end - pushed this in the vicinity of short cover and called through for the run. Bavuma moved to his left, had time to take aim and then breaks the stumps, with Taskin well short. No need to go to the third umpire and Bangladesh have lost their eighth wicket.

short_text: Shamsi to Taskin Ahmed, no run, very full and at the stumps, whipped straight to the fielder at mid-wicket
full_text: Shamsi to Taskin Ahmed, no run, very full and at the stumps, whipped straight to the fielder at mid-wicket

full_text: Pretorius to Taskin Ahmed, 1 run, on a good length and just outside off, a chipped drive, to the right of the bowler and the ball rolls down to long-off for a single

full_text: Pretorius to Mahedi Hasan, 1 run, slower ball down leg, Mahedi was early into the sweep, toe-ends it to the left of the keeper for a single

full_text: Pretorius to Mahedi Hasan, no run, length ball on the leg-stump line, defended to the right of the bowler

full_text: Pretorius to Mahedi Hasan, 2 runs, sloppy work from Maharaj, has an unnecessary shy at the bowler's end and concedes an extra run - was the cutter from Pretorius and Mahedi nudged it with soft hands towards mid-wicket

full_text: Shamsi to Mahedi Hasan, 1 run, Shamsi tosses one just outside off - Mahedi makes room and then chips the drive wide of cover, retains the strike with that run

short_text: Shamsi to Mahedi Hasan, , , fraction short and was picked early by Mahedi - goes deep into the crease on the pull and pl
full_text: Shamsi to Mahedi Hasan, , , fraction short and was picked early by Mahedi - goes deep into the crease on the pull and places it in the gap between deep mid-wicket and long-opn, one bounce and over the ropes

full_text: Shamsi to Taskin Ahmed, 1 run, tossed up well wide of off, driven down to long-off for a single

full_text: Shamsi to Mahedi Hasan, 1 run, dropped short and wide of off, cut square past cover for a single

short_text: Shamsi to Shamim Hossain, Caught by Maharaj!! Bangladesh have been very poor in their thinking today - another senseless
full_text: Shamsi to Shamim Hossain, Caught by Maharaj!! Bangladesh have been very poor in their thinking today - another senseless dismissal and that puts them in a bigger hole. Runs down the pitch did Shamim and then got himself too close to the ball, no room to free his arms, still went through with the lofted drive, gets plenty of height and no distance - Maharaj is under it at long-on and he doesn't drop those.

short_text: Shamsi to Shamim Hossain, 2 runs, tossed up wide of off and spinning away - Shamim plays with the turn and goes over cov
full_text: Shamsi to Shamim Hossain, 2 runs, tossed up wide of off and spinning away - Shamim plays with the turn and goes over cover with the drive, back for the second

short_text: Rabada to Shamim Hossain, 1 run, full and at the stumps, worked away past square leg for a single. Rabada is done for th
full_text: Rabada to Shamim Hossain, 1 run, full and at the stumps, worked away past square leg for a single. Rabada is done for the day, he finishes with impressive figures of 3 for 20, also his career-best T20i figures

short_text: Rabada to Shamim Hossain, 2 runs, on a length and angling across the left-hander - Shamim's weight was on the back-foot
full_text: Rabada to Shamim Hossain, 2 runs, on a length and angling across the left-hander - Shamim's weight was on the back-foot as he looked to go over the top, carves it wide of cover and is back for the second

short_text: Rabada to Shamim Hossain, , fuller length delivery and well wide of off, Shamim clears his left leg and finds mid-off wi
full_text: Rabada to Shamim Hossain, , fuller length delivery and well wide of off, Shamim clears his left leg and finds mid-off with the drive. But it's another no-ball from Rabada

full_text: Rabada to Mahedi Hasan, 1 run, back of a length and at the body, tucked away to long leg for a single

short_text: Rabada to Mahedi Hasan, no run, fuller length delivery and swinging away from outside off - Mahedi saw the width and wen
full_text: Rabada to Mahedi Hasan, no run, fuller length delivery and swinging away from outside off - Mahedi saw the width and went hard on the drive, beaten on the outside edge

short_text: Rabada to Mahedi Hasan, no run, on a good length and in that channel just outside off, draws Mahedi into a timid poke an
full_text: Rabada to Mahedi Hasan, no run, on a good length and in that channel just outside off, draws Mahedi into a timid poke and straightens past the outside edge

short_text: Rabada to Mahedi Hasan, no run, much better from Rabada - keeps it full and just outside off - Mahedi backed away on the
full_text: Rabada to Mahedi Hasan, no run, much better from Rabada - keeps it full and just outside off - Mahedi backed away on the swing and missed

short_text: Rabada to Mahedi Hasan, , short of a length and angling across the right-hander, Mahedi has a spar and is beaten. But Ra
full_text: Rabada to Mahedi Hasan, , short of a length and angling across the right-hander, Mahedi has a spar and is beaten. But Rabada has overstepped and Mahedi will get a free-hit

full_text: Shamsi to Shamim Hossain, no run, loopy delivery on middle, Shamim lunges well forward on the block

short_text: Shamsi to Shamim Hossain, no run, flatter and just outside off, Shamim stays besides the line and finds backward point w
full_text: Shamsi to Shamim Hossain, no run, flatter and just outside off, Shamim stays besides the line and finds backward point with the cut

short_text: Shamsi to Shamim Hossain, no run, appeal for LBW and . They weren't sure, but was worth a try. An attempted reverse swee
full_text: Shamsi to Shamim Hossain, no run, appeal for LBW and . They weren't sure, but was worth a try. An attempted reverse sweep from Shamim Hossain - did the ball straighten enough? was it bouncing over? No bat and UltraEdge confirms it - Onto ball-tracking now: It's angling down leg and South Africa lose a review. Was the wrong 'un and Shamim was beaten on the shot, but it kept going with the angle and the impact itself was umpire's call (just in line with leg stump)

short_text: Shamsi to Mahedi Hasan, 1 run, flighted on the leg-stump line, Mahedi shuffles across and tucks it behind square on the
full_text: Shamsi to Mahedi Hasan, 1 run, flighted on the leg-stump line, Mahedi shuffles across and tucks it behind square on the on-side for a single

full_text: Shamsi to Mahedi Hasan, no run, the wrong 'un from Shamsi, Mahedi went back and then pushed it to the off-side

short_text: Shamsi to Shamim Hossain, 1 run, they aren't reading Shamsi here - was shaping for the slog-sweep, but the ball is very
full_text: Shamsi to Shamim Hossain, 1 run, they aren't reading Shamsi here - was shaping for the slog-sweep, but the ball is very full for the shot, gets an under-edge that rolled backward of square on the on-side for a single

full_text: Maharaj to Mahedi Hasan, 2 runs, Mahedi is living dangerously here, came down the pitch and then tries to go inside out over cover with the drive - ended up slicing it beyond cover-point's reach, back for the second

short_text: Maharaj to Mahedi Hasan, , , the arm-ball from Maharaj, was coming back into the right-hander - Mahedi backs away, expos
full_text: Maharaj to Mahedi Hasan, , , the arm-ball from Maharaj, was coming back into the right-hander - Mahedi backs away, exposes his stumps and then cuts it late, behind square on the off-side for a boundary

full_text: Shamsi to Shamim Hossain, no run, slower and wider of off, pushed into the off-side, can't find the gap and it's the end of a successful first over from Shamsi

short_text: Shamsi to Mahedi Hasan, 1 run, nicely tossed up outside off, Mahedi shimmies down the pitch and drives it to long-off fo
full_text: Shamsi to Mahedi Hasan, 1 run, nicely tossed up outside off, Mahedi shimmies down the pitch and drives it to long-off for a single

short_text: Shamsi to Liton Das, Lbw!! Loud shout and Liton has been given OUT , but he'll . Played all around the leg-break, was it
full_text: Shamsi to Liton Das, Lbw!! Loud shout and Liton has been given OUT , but he'll . Played all around the leg-break, was it bouncing over? Or was it sliding down leg? Don't think height is an issue. UltraEdge confirms that there's no bat, onto ball-tracking and it's three REDS, smashing into leg-stump. Liton is OUT and Bangladesh are out of reviews as well. Lovely stuff from Shamsi - gave this one plenty of air, got the ball to drift away and then turn back, caught Liton on the move as he looked to work it towards mid-wicket - the impact was in front of middle and the height wasn't an issue either. Bangladesh are slipping away towards a mediocre score.

full_text: Pretorius to Liton Das, 1 run, was uppish and just past point! Fuller length delivery outside off, Liton Das went for the drive and hit it uppishly. More of a sliced hit and the ball went just past the fielder for a single to third man

short_text: Pretorius to Shamim Hossain, no run, slips one down leg and Shamim Hossain misses the clip. That went off the pads to th
full_text: Pretorius to Shamim Hossain, no run, slips one down leg and Shamim Hossain misses the clip. That went off the pads to the keeper

short_text: Pretorius to Afif Hossain, Bowled!! What was the batter thinking? This is abject surrender from Afif Hossain and Banglad
full_text: Pretorius to Afif Hossain, Bowled!! What was the batter thinking? This is abject surrender from Afif Hossain and Bangladesh. He jumped out blind and looked to mow it across the line only to miss it and be clean bowled. The ball did kiss the pads on its way to the sticks. Half the side is gone. First ball for Afif Hossain and he wanted to slam it across the line. The clarity in the batting has been missing.

short_text: Nortje to Mahmudullah, Caught by Markram!! This is brutal from SA! Their pacers are bowling really quick. Hang on, Mahmu
full_text: Nortje to Mahmudullah, Caught by Markram!! This is brutal from SA! Their pacers are bowling really quick. Hang on, Mahmudullah has reviewed it. But the ball has touched the thumb on its way up after hitting the shoulder. They lose the review as well. That was a nasty bumper, Mahmudullah tried to hop up and combat it but just couldn't. That took the thumb, then the shoulder and then lobbed up to be taken by the man at point. They are in tatters now. SA doing themselves a big favour as their NRR will have a facelift.

full_text: Nortje to Liton Das, 1 run, low full toss and has been pushed down to long-on for a single as that curved in a little

full_text: Rabada to Mahmudullah, no run, back of a length delivery, outside off, again rears up and Mahmudullah drops his wrists to let it go to the keeper

short_text: Rabada to Mahmudullah, no run, and Rabada is really cranking it up! He is bowling some mean stuff. That was a short ball
full_text: Rabada to Mahmudullah, no run, and Rabada is really cranking it up! He is bowling some mean stuff. That was a short ball, close to the chest and Mahmudullah tried to fend it off. The ball scooped up and Rabada couldn't race down the deck to take it as it landed just short of him

short_text: Rabada to Mahmudullah, , and a wide outside off as the ball moved away a lot outside off. That was pitched up but was to
full_text: Rabada to Mahmudullah, , and a wide outside off as the ball moved away a lot outside off. That was pitched up but was too wide

full_text: Rabada to Mahmudullah, , bangs it in short but that goes down leg for the batter to earn a wide

full_text: Rabada to Mahmudullah, 2 runs, fuller length delivery and Mahmudullah somehow gets the bat down in time and clips it away into the on-side for a single. Mahmudullah closed the face of the bat and got it away

short_text: Rabada to Mushfiqur, Caught by R Hendricks!! And taken! The umpires are checking though whether Hendricks had the ball i
full_text: Rabada to Mushfiqur, Caught by R Hendricks!! And taken! The umpires are checking though whether Hendricks had the ball in control and didn't grass it. And he did have his hand under the ball after a little bobble. That was a back of a length delivery, crept up on the batter and he edged it for the slip fielder to take it. That flew off the bat for the wide slip fielder to gobble it up. Good take in the end and Rabada is breathing fire!

full_text: Nortje to Liton Das, no run, back of a length delivery, outside off, Liton Das stabs it into the off-side and looks for a single only to be sent back

short_text: Rabada to Soumya Sarkar, Lbw!! A batter won't get a tougher ball first up. That was right up there and Soumya Sarkar was
full_text: Rabada to Soumya Sarkar, Lbw!! A batter won't get a tougher ball first up. That was right up there and Soumya Sarkar was late in bringing his bat down. The ball moved a little in the air as well to make it tougher for the batter. The on-field umpire wasn't convinced the SA team was convinced enough to take the review. Bangladesh slip into a hole now.

short_text: Rabada to Naim, Caught by R Hendricks!! And Bangladesh lose wicket number 1! That was a length delivery, Naim drags it a
full_text: Rabada to Naim, Caught by R Hendricks!! And Bangladesh lose wicket number 1! That was a length delivery, Naim drags it across the line and sends it to the man at mid-wicket. That was a touch slower and Naim played the shot a little too early to fall into the trap. Rabada ends his little drought as well.

short_text: Nasum Ahmed to van der Dussen, Caught by Shoriful Islam!! RVD was looking to finish the game with a six to boost that NR
full_text: Nasum Ahmed to van der Dussen, Caught by Shoriful Islam!! RVD was looking to finish the game with a six to boost that NRR, but he didn't get close to the pitch of this flighted delivery after stepping out. The ball took the bottom of the bat, brilliant catch running back from mid-on. The fielder kept his eyes on the ball and timed the dive to stretch-dive to perfection. Fielder's wicket that. Almost close to that Moeen grab off Lewis.

short_text: Taskin Ahmed to Markram, Caught by Naim!! Gone this time! , brilliant fast bowling this from Taskin Ahmed. Test match li
full_text: Taskin Ahmed to Markram, Caught by Naim!! Gone this time! , brilliant fast bowling this from Taskin Ahmed. Test match line and length. Pacy good length delivery that holds its line outside off, Markram stays back and pokes at this only to nick it off to first slip. Naim dived to his left to take a wonderful catch. South Africa have lost three wickets inside the powerplay.

short_text: Taskin Ahmed to Markram, byes, , whoa! That seamed back in a mile. Pitched outside off on a good length at and it cut it
full_text: Taskin Ahmed to Markram, byes, , whoa! That seamed back in a mile. Pitched outside off on a good length at and it cut it sharply. Markram had no chance to play that. Looked to punch from the crease and got beaten on the inside edge. Lost his bat too. Even the keeper couldn't stop it with a dive

short_text: Taskin Ahmed to R Hendricks, Lbw!! This looks out! , Hendricks has a word with his batting partner and decides to walk o
full_text: Taskin Ahmed to R Hendricks, Lbw!! This looks out! , Hendricks has a word with his batting partner and decides to walk off. Fuller than good length, keeps coming in with the angle and Hendricks ends up playing outside the line as he tries to keep it out on the off-side. Beaten on the inside edge as the ball nipped in and is rapped on the pads adjacent to off. That's plumb and umpire Paul Reiffel was quick to raise the dreaded finger. Bangladesh have an early breakthrough.

full_text: Taskin Ahmed to R Hendricks, no run, , good length on off, Hendricks stays in his crease and defends with a squared up stance

full_text: Taskin Ahmed to R Hendricks, , , Taskin overpitches outside off and Hendricks gets off the mark with a boundary. No real feet movement and it's a . Placed it in the gap through extra cover and the outfield did the rest
